decisions.rationale: The cited block p003_c0003 merely lists treatment types under 'Traffic and Safety' heading (Left-Turn Lane Improvement Projects, Signal Timing Optimization, Advanced Signals, Pedestrian Islands, Sidewalks, Wider Medians) as part of a 'Toolbox of Improvements' slide. The block text does not explicitly state that these treatments are attached to a specific project or corridor. A mere listing of treatments is not evidence of attachment.

evidence_refs.source_quote: ▪ Left-Turn Lane Improvement Projects ▪ Signal Timing Optimization ▪ Advanced Signals ▪ Pedestrian Islands ▪ Sidewalks ▪ Wider Medians
